cases.question: What uptime does the SLA guarantee?

full.answer: The service guarantees 99.95 percent uptime under the SLA (Service-Level Agreement). This means that the service aims to be available for use at least 99.95% of the time, allowing a maximum of 1 hour and 12 minutes of downtime per year.

cases.question: How many times is a webhook retried?

full.answer: Each event is processed by a node, and the processing happens within a single data packet. So yes, each message has a TTL (Time-To-Live). The process repeats when a message passes through nodes until it gets removed or a condition met, so in fact  it does expire and get deleted
